changeSet.author: openelis-bioequivalence

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Bioequivalence Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page_allowed_roles npar JOIN clinlims.notebook_page np ON npar.notebook_page_id = np.id JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Bioequivalence Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 1

changeSet.comment: Add role restrictions for Bioequivalence Sample Reception page

column.name: notebook_page_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT np.id FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Bioequivalence Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 1)
